languages.text: {n}Оба техножреца кланяются и удаляются, негромко переговариваясь на {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}лингва-технис{/g}. Неизвестно как долго продержится шаткий мир между ними, но есть надежда, что их сотрудничество принесет плоды.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Оба техножреца спокойно удаляются, негромко переговариваясь на {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}лингва-технис{/g}. Маловероятно, что это сотрудничество будет действительно плодотворным — но, как минимум, вам удалось снизить накал их противостояния.{/n}

languages.text: {n}The Tech-Priests bow and depart together, conversing quietly in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}. It is uncertain how long this fragile peace between them will last, but there is hope that their collaboration will bear fruit.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}Оба техножреца кланяются и удаляются, негромко переговариваясь на {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}лингва-технис{/g}. Неизвестно как долго продержится шаткий мир между ними, но есть надежда, что их сотрудничество принесет плоды.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Both Tech-Priests bow and depart, conversing quietly in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}. It is uncertain how long this fragile peace between them will last, but there is hope that their collaboration will bear fruit.{/n}

{n}The Tech-Priests bow and depart together, conversing quietly in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}. It is uncertain how long this fragile peace between them will last, but there is hope that their collaboration will bear fruit.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Die Techpriester verbeugen sich und ziehen sich gemeinsam zurück. Beim Gehen unterhalten sie sich leise in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g}. Es ist ungewiss, wie lange ihr brüchiger Frieden andauern wird, aber es besteht Hoffnung, dass ihre Zusammenarbeit Früchte tragen wird.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priests bow and depart together, conversing quietly in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}. It is uncertain how long this fragile peace between them will last, but there is hope that their collaboration will bear fruit.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Die Techpriester verbeugen sich und ziehen sich gemeinsam zurück. Beim Gehen unterhalten sie sich leise in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g}. Es ist ungewiss, wie lange ihr brüchiger Frieden andauern wird, aber es besteht Hoffnung, dass ihre Zusammenarbeit Früchte tragen wird.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Les technoprêtres s'inclinent et s'éloignent ensemble en murmurant en {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}langage technique{/g}. Qui sait combien de temps durera cette paix fragile entre eux... mais on ne peut qu'espérer que cette collaboration portera ses fruits.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priests bow and depart together, conversing quietly in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}. It is uncertain how long this fragile peace between them will last, but there is hope that their collaboration will bear fruit.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Les technoprêtres s'inclinent et s'éloignent ensemble en murmurant en {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}langage technique{/g}. Qui sait combien de temps durera cette paix fragile entre eux... mais on ne peut qu'espérer que cette collaboration portera ses fruits.{/n}

languages.text: {n}两位技术神甫躬身告退，同时用{g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}科技文{/g}低声交谈。虽然这种脆弱的和平不知能维持多久，但他们之间的协作仍有希望开花结果。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priests bow and depart together, conversing quietly in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}. It is uncertain how long this fragile peace between them will last, but there is hope that their collaboration will bear fruit.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}两位技术神甫躬身告退，同时用{g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}科技文{/g}低声交谈。虽然这种脆弱的和平不知能维持多久，但他们之间的协作仍有希望开花结果。{/n}

languages.text: {n}Los tecnosacerdotes hacen una reverencia y se marchan juntos, hablando en voz baja en {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Tecnis{/g}. No sabes cuánto durará esta frágil paz, pero hay esperanzas de que su cooperación sea fructífera.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priests bow and depart together, conversing quietly in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}. It is uncertain how long this fragile peace between them will last, but there is hope that their collaboration will bear fruit.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Los tecnosacerdotes hacen una reverencia y se marchan juntos, hablando en voz baja en {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Tecnis{/g}. No sabes cuánto durará esta frágil paz, pero hay esperanzas de que su cooperación sea fructífera.{/n}

languages.text: {n}テック・プリーストたちはお辞儀をし、{g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g} で静かに会話しながら、共に旅立つ。このもろい平和がいつまで続くかはわからないが、彼らの協力が実を結ぶという希望はある。{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priests bow and depart together, conversing quietly in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}. It is uncertain how long this fragile peace between them will last, but there is hope that their collaboration will bear fruit.{/n}

languages.text: {n}Eğilen Tekno Rahipler, {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g} dilinde sessizce konuşarak birlikte ayrılıyor. Aralarındaki bu kırılgan barışın ne kadar süreceği belirsiz olsa da iş birliklerinin meyve vereceğinden umutlusun.{/n}
languages.original_text: {n}The Tech-Priests bow and depart together, conversing quietly in {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua-Technis{/g}. It is uncertain how long this fragile peace between them will last, but there is hope that their collaboration will bear fruit.{/n}

traits.locale_text: {n}Eğilen Tekno Rahipler, {g|Encyclopedia:LinguaTechnis}Lingua Technis{/g} dilinde sessizce konuşarak birlikte ayrılıyor. Aralarındaki bu kırılgan barışın ne kadar süreceği belirsiz olsa da iş birliklerinin meyve vereceğinden umutlusun.{/n}
